gates.name: OWNER_GATE_N_PRODUCTION_READ_ONLY_FINGERPRINT
gates.reason: Owner-supplied read-only evidence was accepted by the repository verifier.
gates.command: No production command is authorized by this completed gate.
gates.secret_safe_check: The tracked summary contains no credentials, production URL, production ref, raw evidence, or receipt contents.
gates.expected_success: Accepted owner evidence is reflected without copying raw evidence into Git.
gates.cleanup: Raw owner evidence remains outside Git and excluded locally.
gates.work_without_gate: Complete. Production migration, canary write, and public beta remain separately gated.

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_N_PRODUCTION_BACKUP
gates.reason: A verified backup is required before any production migration.
gates.command: Do not run a backup from this package.
gates.secret_safe_check: No credential or backup material is tracked.
gates.expected_success: A future owner-approved backup record is retained outside Git.
share_back: sanitized timestamp, size, and hash only if separately approved
gates.cleanup: Clear temporary credentials after an approved future operation.

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_N_PRODUCTION_MIGRATION
gates.reason: Migration readiness is HOLD with unresolved scoped differences.
preconditions: migration readiness is no longer HOLD
final migration and rollback are approved
gates.command: Do not execute a production migration in this package.
gates.secret_safe_check: No production credential or SQL is tracked here.
gates.expected_success: A separate approved migration report exists.
gates.cleanup: Clear temporary credentials after an approved future operation.

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_N_NONPRODUCTION_MANUAL_SQL
gates.reason: No manual SQL was needed for the completed non-production rehearsal.
preconditions: a future approved non-production operation needs manual SQL
gates.command: Do not execute manual SQL for this completed run.
gates.secret_safe_check: No credential or SQL Editor action is required.
gates.work_without_gate: The N-Q non-production rehearsal is complete.

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_N_CANARY_WRITE
gates.reason: A production canary write would change public data.
preconditions: named operators and stop conditions are approved
gates.command: No canary write command is authorized in this package.
gates.secret_safe_check: No credential is needed before authorization.
gates.expected_success: A future canary write report passes all approved conditions.
share_back: sanitized aggregate counts and rollback verification only
gates.cleanup: Clear temporary credentials after an approved future operation.

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_P_CAU_012_INVENTORY
gates.reason: Official unit, board, and exact list URL evidence is incomplete.
preconditions: new exact official evidence is supplied
gates.command: Do not create a source or run SQL.
gates.expected_success: The item remains excluded until evidence is complete.
share_back: new exact official evidence if it becomes available
gates.work_without_gate: The item remains excluded from creation, crawling, and canary.

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_O_PRODUCTION_PROJECTION_BINDING
gates.reason: Production projection binding requires separately approved migration decisions.
preconditions: all required migration differences are decided
gates.command: No production projector command is authorized.
gates.secret_safe_check: No credential is needed for the local readiness review.
gates.expected_success: Required binding decisions and rollback path are approved.

gates.name: OWNER_GATE_Q_PUBLIC_BETA
gates.reason: Public beta remains a product and operational release decision.
preconditions: production migration and canary rollout pass
release checklist has no HOLD item
gates.command: No public beta enable command is authorized in this package.
gates.expected_success: A future explicit owner GO decision is recorded.
share_back: GO or HOLD decision and accepted risks
gates.cleanup: Use approved rollback procedures if a future GO is reversed.
